utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan for presence and full specification with costs as requested.
- health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes physical_health with plan name and €45/month, mental_health with plan name and €30/month, and a total_health_cost. This is fully specified with costs. Included.
- property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides equipment_protection (which is not clearly home/contents) with €30/month and a coverage_limit for electronics. It lacks explicit home/contents insurance; also no explicit costed home insurance item. Therefore not fully specified per the required “home/contents insurance with costs.” Not included.
- travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. Plan includes travel_insurance with plan name and €20/month and a brief coverage description. This meets the requirement. Included.
- additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists professional_liability €30/month and alternative_medicine €30/month with details. Costs are present. Included.
- total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan includes monthly_cost and annual_cost, plus extra metadata. This meets the requirement. Included.
Thus, 4 of 5 items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes items named: SecureLife Basic Plan (for physical health at €45/month), SecureLife Basic Plan (for mental health at €30/month), SecureLife Basic Coverage (property/equipment protection at €30/month), SecureLife Basic Plan (travel insurance at €20/month), and Basic Professional Coverage (professional liability) plus Alternative Medicine Services. From the ground-truth ratings: SecureLife Basic Plan exists under primary_health.physical_health with rating 4 and under mental_health with rating 8, and under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 4. SecureLife Basic Coverage exists under property_protection.home_content with rating 6. There are no ground-truth entries for Basic Professional Coverage or Alternative Medicine Services, so only map the items that have exact matches in the ratings dataset.
